name: Brown Rice & Lentil Stew
recipeIngredient: 14 3/4 oz Canned peeled whole tomatoes, undrained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients with 2 cups water in a Dutch oven or large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally.
4. Cook for 55 minutes to 1 hour, or until the rice is tender.
5. Remove and discard the bay leaf before serving.
Each serving provides:  252 calories  10.5 g. protein  1.4 g. fat  50.7 g. carbohydrate  917 mg. sodium  1 mg. cholesterol
Source: Sport Sense - The Common Sense Approach to a Healthful Lifestyle
